name: Cloudflare API
description:
Welcome to Cloudflare's API documentation site. We are experimenting with an updated version of our API documentation - check out [developers.cloudflare.com/api-next/](https://developers.cloudflare.com/api-next/) to test out the new experience.

To get started using Cloudflare's products and services via the API, refer to [how to interact with Cloudflare](https://developers.cloudflare.

capabilities.name: accounts
capabilities.description: Manage accounts — create an account, batch move accounts, move account. Supports standard CRUD operations through the REST API.

capabilities.name: applications
capabilities.description: Manage applications — create application, get  applications, get application by id. Supports standard CRUD operations through the REST API.

capabilities.name: category
capabilities.description: Manage category — creates a new category, updates a category, get all application categories. Supports standard CRUD operations through the REST API.

capabilities.name: custom_pages_for_an_account
capabilities.description: Manage custom pages for an account — update a custom page, list custom pages, get a custom page. Supports standard CRUD operations through the REST API.

capabilities.name: tseng_abuse_complaint_processor_other
capabilities.description: Manage tseng abuse complaint processor other — request review on mitigations, submit an abuse report, list abuse reports. Supports standard CRUD operations through the REST API.

capabilities.name: mcp_portal
capabilities.description: Manage mcp portal — create a new mcp portal, update a mcp portal, list mcp portals. Supports standard CRUD operations through the REST API.

capabilities.name: mcp_portal_servers
capabilities.description: Manage mcp portal servers — create a new mcp server, sync mcp server capabilities, update a mcp server. Supports standard CRUD operations through the REST API.

capabilities.name: access_applications
capabilities.description: Manage access applications — add an access application, revoke application tokens, update an access application. Supports standard CRUD operations through the REST API.

capabilities.name: access_short_lived_certificate_cas
capabilities.description: Manage access short lived certificate cas — create a short-lived certificate ca, list short-lived certificate cas, get a short-lived certificate ca. Supports standard CRUD operations through the REST API.

capabilities.name: access_application_scoped_policies
capabilities.description: Manage access application scoped policies — create an access application policy, update an access application policy, convert an access application policy to a reusable policy. Supports standard CRUD operations through the REST API.

capabilities.name: access_m_tls_authentication
capabilities.description: Manage access m tls authentication — add an mtls certificate, update an mtls certificate's hostname settings, update an mtls certificate. Supports standard CRUD operations through the REST API.

capabilities.name: access_custom_pages
capabilities.description: Manage access custom pages — create a custom page, update a custom page, list custom pages. Supports standard CRUD operations through the REST API.
